src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / JDK 21 stack), causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if the old imports are used.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/errors/Gl.general_idea: Migrate validation API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 on JDK 21.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/errors/Gl.why_exists: Class javax.validation.ConstraintViolationException does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/logging/S.general_idea: Migrate servlet imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/logging/S.why_exists: Compilation failure due to missing javax.servlet classes in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the javax namespace was removed in favor of jakarta.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and JDK 21 ecosystems.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors due to missing symbols.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and JDK 21 ecosystems.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Compilation failure due to missing javax.servlet classes which have been removed/relocated in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean pattern required in Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions; extending it causes compilation errors or runtime failures in Spring Boot 3.x (JDK 17+).

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate authentication manager bean definition from super method to AuthenticationConfiguration injection.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: The super.authenticationManagerBean() method is removed in the new SecurityFilterChain paradigm; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Replace configure(HttpSecurity) override with SecurityFilterChain bean definition.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is no longer the standard entry point; overriding it in a non-adapter class or using the old fluent API structure causes compilation errors or ignored configuration.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.before:
@Override
protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
    http.cors().and()
            .csrf().disable()
            .authorizeRequests()
            .antMatchers(HttpMethod.OPTIONS).denyAll()
            .antMatchers(HttpMethod.TRACE).denyAll()
            .antMatchers(HttpMethod.HEAD).denyAll()
            .antMatchers(getWhiteListPatterns()).permitAll()
            .anyRequest().authenticated().and()
            .addFilter(new JwtAuthenticationFilter(authenticationManager(), jwtTokenManager))
            .addFilter(new JwtAuthorizationFilter(authenticationManager(), jwtTokenManager))
            .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS);
}
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.after:
@Bean
public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http, AuthenticationManager authManager) throws Exception {
    http.formLogin(form -> form.disable())
            .csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable())
            .logout(logout -> logout.logoutUrl(LOGOUT_PATH)
                .logoutSuccessHandler(new HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler(HttpStatus.OK))
                .permitAll())
            .cors(cors -> cors.configurationSource(corsConfiguration()))
            .authorizeHttpRequests(auth -> auth
                .requestMatchers(HttpMethod.OPTIONS).denyAll()
                .requestMatchers(HttpMethod.TRACE).denyAll()
                .requestMatchers(HttpMethod.HEAD).denyAll()
                .requestMatchers(getWhiteListPatterns()).permitAll()
                .requestMatchers("/api/v1/user/me").authenticated()
                .anyRequest().authenticated())
            .addFilter(jwtAuthenticationFilter(authManager))
            .addFilter(jwtAuthorizationFilter(authManager))
            .sessionManagement(session -> session.sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS));
    return http.build();
}

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in HTTP security configuration.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.x; using it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Replace authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests in HTTP security configuration.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: authorizeRequests is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6.x; using it causes compilation errors.
The configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) method is removed in the new SecurityFilterChain paradigm; overriding it causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Add EnableMethodSecurity annotation to replace global method security configuration.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Global method security configuration via WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed; @EnableMethodSecurity is required for method-level security in Spring Security 6.x.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update CORS configuration to use lambda-based DSL and addAllowedOriginPattern.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: The old cors().and() syntax is deprecated; addAllowedOrigin is removed in favor of addAllowedOriginPattern in newer Spring Security versions to support wildcard origins correctly.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Refactor JWT filter instantiation to use dedicated factory methods.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Filters are now instantiated within the SecurityFilterChain bean; direct instantiation in configure() is no longer possible.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ / Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JWT parsing API to use the new immutable builder pattern introduced in jjwt 0.12+.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Compile error: method parserBuilder() is removed/obsolete; new API requires parser().verifyWith().build().

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Update JWT building API to use fluent setter methods instead of legacy setSubject/setExpiration.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Compile error: methods setSubject and setExpiration are removed in favor of subject() and expiration() in newer jjwt versions.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / JDK 21 stack), causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if the build targets the new namespace.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / JDK 21 ecosystem), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3 / JDK 21 ecosystem), causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if the old imports are used with new dependencies.
